title: Brookings Area Master Gardeners Scholarship
story: Awarded $1,000 in recognition of contributions to plant science and community-oriented horticulture research.

title: Wheat Initiative Phenotyping Travel Award
org: European Plant Phenotyping Training School · Bonn, Germany
story: Selected for the Early Working Group travel award ($1,800) to attend the European Plant Phenotyping Training School in Bonn - connecting with the global phenomics community.

title: Early Career Travel Award
org: National Association for Plant Breeding · Hawaii
story: Received $1,000 to present my UAV deep-transfer-learning work for grain yield prediction at the national plant breeding meeting.

title: NAPPN Conference Travel Award
org: North American Plant Phenotyping Network · Johnston, IA
story: Travel support ($1,000) to share high-throughput phenotyping research with the North American phenomics network.

title: Edgar S. McFadden Graduate Scholarship
story: A $5,500 departmental scholarship honoring the legacy of wheat breeding pioneer Edgar McFadden - a milestone that affirmed my path in wheat improvement.

title: Gerald O. Mott Award
story: Recognized as a meritorious graduate student in crop science by CSSA - one of the honors I'm most proud of.

title: Encompass Scholar
story: Selected for the CSSA Encompass program supporting the next generation of leaders in the crop sciences.

title: Science Communication Fellowship
org: SD EPSCoR · South Dakota Discovery Center
story: Trained to translate complex plant-science research into engaging stories for the public - a skill I bring to this very blog.

title: AG2PI Travel Award
story: A $1,500 award supporting participation in genome-to-phenome research and training events.

title: Dr. Sukhdev Singh Award for Best Essay
story: Honored for the best scientific essay during my Master's - an early sign that I love writing about science as much as doing it.

title: University Merit Fellowship (Masters)
story: Merit fellowship awarded for academic performance entering the M.Sc. in Plant Breeding & Genetics.

title: University Merit Award (×4)
story: Earned the University Merit Award every year (2014-2017) of my undergraduate degree, graduating with a 3.99/4 GPA.
